title: Rankings and Recognitions
content: Rankings and Recognitions 2025-26 3.40 A+ JUIT is NAAC A+ graded University with score of 3.40 in April 2024 for five years 201-300 INDIA RANKINGS 2025 (NIRF, MHRD) JUIT Ranked 201-300 Among Engineering Institutes in the Country B.Tech. Biotechnology Program got NBA Accreditation from academic year 2024 to academic year 2027. 3.5 Received 3.5 star rating for Institution's Innovation Council (IIC) activities prescribed by Innovation Cell, Ministry of Education in the year 2023-24 301-350 JUIT is Ranked 301-350 in Asia University Rankings 2025 by Times Higher Education 401-500 JUIT is Ranked 401–500 in Interdisciplinary Science Ranking 2026 by Times Higher Education 601-800 JUIT is Ranked 601-800 in World University Rankings 2026 by subject: engineering by Times Higher Education 801-1000 JUIT is Ranked 801-1000 in World University Rankings 2026 by subject: computer science by Times Higher Education 1001-1200 JUIT is Ranked 1001-1200 in World University Rankings 2026 by Times Higher Education +1501 JUIT is Ranked + 1501 in Impact Rankings 2026 by Times Higher Education 179 JUIT is ranked 179 in QS Asia University Rankings 2025 : Southern Asia 601-620 JUIT is ranked 601-620 in QS Asia University Rankings 2025 +1501 JUIT is Ranked +1501 in Sustainability Rankings 2026 by QS 189 JUIT is Ranked 189th in India By SCImago ranking 2025 80th in Overall percentile 94th in Research percentile 48th in Innovation percentile 63rd in Societal percentile Ranked JUIT is Ranked in Four Different Categories by: R World International Ranking Platinum in O.B.E 5.0 Titanium in Sustainability Platinum in Mental Health and Wellbeing (MHW) Diamond in Stakeholders Sentimental Survey 29 JUIT is Ranked 29th in Best Private University in India 2025 by: India Today 4 JUIT is ranked 4th in Private Technical Universities in the North Zone by The WEEK, 2025. 7 JUIT is Ranked 7th in Private Technical Universities all over India by The WEEK, 2025. 34 JUIT is Ranked 34th in India in all Universities by The WEEK, 2025.
